judge_result.short_rationale: Core actions are present: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth, give water, and seek care. However, it changes the source-backed 200–300 ml to vague 'plenty of water,' puts mouth rinse before the vomiting prohibition, and says go quickly to hospital rather than the more direct immediate medical attention. Usable in the field, but only partly traceable to the canonical wording.

  "short_rationale": "Core actions are present: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth, give water, and seek care. However, it changes the source-backed 200–300 ml to vague 'plenty of water,' puts mouth rinse before the vomiting prohibition, and says go quickly to hospital rather than the more direct immediate medical attention. Usable in the field, but only partly traceable to the canonical wording."
